Properties.Description: Material Inventory DynamoDB Table Name
Properties.Name: /dev/product-domain/dynamodb/material-inventory-table-name

Properties.Description: Stock Movements DynamoDB Table Name
Properties.Name: /dev/product-domain/dynamodb/stock-movements-table-name

Properties.Description: Suppliers DynamoDB Table Name
Properties.Name: /dev/product-domain/dynamodb/suppliers-table-name

Properties.Description: Basement Products DynamoDB Table Name
Properties.Name: /dev/product-domain/dynamodb/basement-products-table-name

Properties.Description: Product Quantities DynamoDB Table Name
Properties.Name: /dev/product-domain/dynamodb/product-quantities-table-name

Properties.Description: IAM role for Product AppSync API CloudWatch Logs

Properties.Definition:
type Query {
  getProduct(productId: ID!): Product
  listProducts(
    makerUserId: ID
    categoryId: ID
    status: ProductStatus
    limit: Int
    nextToken: String
  ): ProductsConnection
  getProductMedia(productId: ID!, limit: Int, nextToken: String): ProductMediaConnection
  getProductMaterials(productId: ID!, limit: Int, nextToken: String): ProductMaterialsConnection
  getProductProcessSteps(productId: ID!, limit: Int, nextToken: String): ProcessStepsConnection
  getProductBatches(productId: ID!, limit: Int, nextToken: String): BatchesConnection
  getProductCertificates(productId: ID!, limit: Int, nextToken: String): CertificatesConnection
  getCategories(limit: Int, nextToken: String): CategoriesConnection
  getCategory(categoryId: ID!): Category
  getMaterialInventory(makerUserId: ID!, materialId: ID!): MaterialInventory
  listMaterialInventory(makerUserId: ID!, limit: Int, nextToken: String): MaterialInventoryConnection
  getLowStockMaterials(makerUserId: ID!): [MaterialInventory!]!
  getStockMovements(makerUserId: ID!, materialId: ID, limit: Int, nextToken: String): StockMovementsConnection
  getSupplier(makerUserId: ID!, supplierId: ID!): Supplier
  listSuppliers(makerUserId: ID!, limit: Int, nextToken: String): SuppliersConnection
}

type Mutation {
  createProduct(input: CreateProductInput!): Product
  updateProduct(input: UpdateProductInput!): Product
  publishProduct(productId: ID!): Product
  pauseProduct(productId: ID!): Product
  addProductMedia(input: AddProductMediaInput!): ProductMedia
  removeProductMedia(input: RemoveProductMediaInput!): Boolean
  addProductMaterial(input: AddProductMaterialInput!): ProductMaterial
  removeProductMaterial(input: RemoveProductMaterialInput!): Boolean
  addProcessStep(input: AddProcessStepInput!): ProcessStep
  removeProcessStep(input: RemoveProcessStepInput!): Boolean
  createBatch(input: CreateBatchInput!): Batch
  generateCertificate(input: GenerateCertificateInput!): Certificate
  addMaterialToInventory(input: AddMaterialInput!): MaterialInventory
  updateMaterialStock(input: UpdateMaterialStockInput!): MaterialInventory
  recordStockMovement(input: RecordStockMovementInput!): StockMovement
  addSupplier(input: AddSupplierInput!): Supplier
  updateSupplier(input: UpdateSupplierInput!): Supplier
  removeSupplier(makerUserId: ID!, supplierId: ID!): Boolean
}

type Subscription {
  onProductPublished(makerUserId: ID!): Product
    @aws_subscribe(mutations: ["publishProduct"])
  onProductUpdated(productId: ID!): Product
    @aws_subscribe(mutations: ["updateProduct"])
  onProductPaused(productId: ID!): Product
    @aws_subscribe(mutations: ["pauseProduct"])
  onLowStock(makerUserId: ID!): MaterialInventory
    @aws_subscribe(mutations: ["updateMaterialStock"])
  onStockMovement(makerUserId: ID!): StockMovement
    @aws_subscribe(mutations: ["recordStockMovement"])
}

enum ProductStatus {
  DRAFT
  ACTIVE
  PAUSED
  SOLD_OUT
  ARCHIVED
}

enum ProductType {
  ONE_OF_ONE
  LIMITED_BATCH
  MADE_TO_ORDER
}

type Product {
  productId: ID!
  makerUserId: ID!
  title: String!
  description: String!
  categoryId: ID!
  category: Category
  productType: ProductType!
  basePrice: Float!
  quantityAvailable: Int
  status: ProductStatus!
  media: [ProductMedia!]
  materials: [ProductMaterial!]
  processSteps: [ProcessStep!]
  batches: [Batch!]
  certificates: [Certificate!]
  createdAt: AWSDateTime!
  updatedAt: AWSDateTime!
}

type ProductsConnection {
  items: [Product!]!
  nextToken: String
}

type ProductMedia {
  productId: ID!
  mediaId: ID!
  mediaType: String!
  url: String!
  order: Int!
  createdAt: AWSDateTime!
}

type ProductMediaConnection {
  items: [ProductMedia!]!
  nextToken: String
}

type ProductMaterial {
  productId: ID!
  materialId: ID!
  name: String!
  source: String!
  locallySourced: Boolean!
  upcycled: Boolean!
  sustainable: Boolean!
  certificationId: String
  createdAt: AWSDateTime!
}

type ProductMaterialsConnection {
  items: [ProductMaterial!]!
  nextToken: String
}

type ProcessStep {
  productId: ID!
  stepId: ID!
  stepNumber: Int!
  title: String!
  description: String
  durationMinutes: Int
  mediaUrl: String
  createdAt: AWSDateTime!
}

type ProcessStepsConnection {
  items: [ProcessStep!]!
  nextToken: String
}

type Batch {
  productId: ID!
  batchId: ID!
  quantity: Int!
  remainingQuantity: Int!
  createdAt: AWSDateTime!
  producedAt: AWSDateTime
}

type BatchesConnection {
  items: [Batch!]!
  nextToken: String
}

type Certificate {
  productId: ID!
  certificateId: ID!
  orderId: ID!
  qrCode: String!
  materialMetadata: AWSJSON!
  creationMetadata: AWSJSON!
  createdAt: AWSDateTime!
}

type CertificatesConnection {
  items: [Certificate!]!
  nextToken: String
}

enum MaterialType {
  WOOD
  METAL
  LEATHER
  FABRIC
  CERAMIC
  GLASS
  STONE
  PAPER
  PLASTIC
  RESIN
  PAINT
  FINISH
  ADHESIVE
  HARDWARE
  PACKAGING
  OTHER
}

enum StockStatus {
  IN_STOCK
  LOW_STOCK
  OUT_OF_STOCK
  REORDER_PENDING
}

enum MovementType {
  PURCHASE
  USAGE
  WASTE
  RETURN_TO_SUPPLIER
  ADJUSTMENT
  TRANSFER
  DAMAGED
}

enum MeasurementUnit {
  KILOGRAMS
  GRAMS
  POUNDS
  OUNCES
  LITERS
  MILLILITERS
  METERS
  CENTIMETERS
  INCHES
  FEET
  SQUARE_METERS
  SQUARE_FEET
  PIECES
  SHEETS
  ROLLS
}

type MaterialInventory {
  makerUserId: ID!
  materialId: ID!
  materialName: String!
  materialType: MaterialType!
  currentStock: Float!
  unit: MeasurementUnit!
  reorderThreshold: Float!
  reorderQuantity: Float!
  stockStatus: StockStatus!
  costPerUnit: Float!
  supplierId: ID
  supplier: Supplier
  lastRestockDate: AWSDateTime
  location: String
  notes: String
  sustainable: Boolean
  certified: Boolean
  certificationId: String
  originCountry: String
  createdAt: AWSDateTime!
  updatedAt: AWSDateTime!
}

type MaterialInventoryConnection {
  items: [MaterialInventory!]!
  nextToken: String
}

type StockMovement {
  makerUserId: ID!
  materialId: ID!
  movementId: ID!
  movementType: MovementType!
  quantity: Float!
  unit: MeasurementUnit!
  costPerUnit: Float
  totalCost: Float
  supplierId: ID
  orderId: ID
  productId: ID
  notes: String
  movementTimestamp: AWSDateTime!
}

type StockMovementsConnection {
  items: [StockMovement!]!
  nextToken: String
}

type Supplier {
  makerUserId: ID!
  supplierId: ID!
  companyName: String!
  contactName: String
  email: String
  phone: String
  website: String
  address: String
  city: String
  state: String
  country: String!
  postalCode: String
  materialsSupplied: [MaterialType!]!
  leadTimeDays: Int!
  minimumOrderValue: Float
  paymentTerms: String
  reliabilityScore: Float
  sustainabilityCertified: Boolean
  notes: String
  lastOrderDate: AWSDateTime
  totalOrderCount: Int
  createdAt: AWSDateTime!
  updatedAt: AWSDateTime!
}

type SuppliersConnection {
  items: [Supplier!]!
  nextToken: String
}

input AddMaterialInput {
  makerUserId: ID!
  materialName: String!
  materialType: MaterialType!
  currentStock: Float!
  unit: MeasurementUnit!
  reorderThreshold: Float!
  reorderQuantity: Float!
  costPerUnit: Float!
  supplierId: ID
  location: String
  notes: String
  sustainable: Boolean
  certified: Boolean
  certificationId: String
  originCountry: String
}

input UpdateMaterialStockInput {
  makerUserId: ID!
  materialId: ID!
  currentStock: Float
  reorderThreshold: Float
  reorderQuantity: Float
  costPerUnit: Float
  location: String
  notes: String
}

input RecordStockMovementInput {
  makerUserId: ID!
  materialId: ID!
  movementType: MovementType!
  quantity: Float!
  unit: MeasurementUnit!
  costPerUnit: Float
  totalCost: Float
  supplierId: ID
  orderId: ID
  productId: ID
  notes: String
}

input AddSupplierInput {
  makerUserId: ID!
  companyName: String!
  contactName: String
  email: String
  phone: String
  website: String
  address: String
  city: String
  state: String
  country: String!
  postalCode: String
  materialsSupplied: [MaterialType!]!
  leadTimeDays: Int!
  minimumOrderValue: Float
  paymentTerms: String
  sustainabilityCertified: Boolean
  notes: String
}

input UpdateSupplierInput {
  makerUserId: ID!
  supplierId: ID!
  companyName: String
  contactName: String
  email: String
  phone: String
  website: String
  address: String
  city: String
  state: String
  country: String
  postalCode: String
  materialsSupplied: [MaterialType!]
  leadTimeDays: Int
  minimumOrderValue: Float
  paymentTerms: String
  reliabilityScore: Float
  sustainabilityCertified: Boolean
  notes: String
}

type Category {
  categoryId: ID!
  name: String!
  description: String
  parentCategoryId: ID
  createdAt: AWSDateTime!
}

type CategoriesConnection {
  items: [Category!]!
  nextToken: String
}

input CreateProductInput {
  makerUserId: ID!
  title: String!
  description: String!
  categoryId: ID!
  productType: ProductType!
  basePrice: Float!
  quantityAvailable: Int
}

input UpdateProductInput {
  productId: ID!
  title: String
  description: String
  categoryId: ID
  basePrice: Float
  quantityAvailable: Int
  status: ProductStatus
}

input AddProductMediaInput {
  productId: ID!
  mediaType: String!
  url: String!
  order: Int!
}

input RemoveProductMediaInput {
  productId: ID!
  mediaId: ID!
}

input AddProductMaterialInput {
  productId: ID!
  name: String!
  source: String!
  locallySourced: Boolean!
  upcycled: Boolean!
  sustainable: Boolean!
  certificationId: String
}

input RemoveProductMaterialInput {
  productId: ID!
  materialId: ID!
}

input AddProcessStepInput {
  productId: ID!
  title: String!
  description: String
  durationMinutes: Int
  mediaUrl: String
}

input RemoveProcessStepInput {
  productId: ID!
  stepId: ID!
}

input CreateBatchInput {
  productId: ID!
  quantity: Int!
  producedAt: AWSDateTime
}

input GenerateCertificateInput {
  productId: ID!
  orderId: ID!
  materialMetadata: AWSJSON!
  creationMetadata: AWSJSON!
}

Properties.Description: Product Domain AppSync GraphQL API URL
Properties.Name: /dev/product-domain/appsync/api-url

Properties.Description: Product Domain AppSync GraphQL API ID
Properties.Name: /dev/product-domain/appsync/api-id

Fn::Join: Lambda function for auto-deleting objects in

Properties.Description: Product Domain Step Functions State Machine ARN
Properties.Name: /dev/product-domain/stepfunctions/state-machine-arn

Properties.Description: IAM role for Publish Product Lambda with Step Functions access
Publish product by invoking Step Functions state machine
IAM role for Create Product Lambda
Create a new product
IAM role for Update Product Lambda
Update an existing product
IAM role for Pause Product Lambda
Pause a product
IAM role for Get Product Lambda
Get product by product ID
IAM role for List Products Lambda
List products with filters
IAM role for Add Product Media Lambda
Add media (images, videos) to a product
IAM role for Add Product Material Lambda
Add material information to a product
IAM role for Add Process Step Lambda
Add a process step to a product
IAM role for Create Batch Lambda
Create a batch for a limited batch product
IAM role for Generate Certificate Lambda
Generate authenticity certificate for a product

ProductAppSyncProductAppSyncApiIdF3219D4.Description: Product Domain AppSync GraphQL API ID
